title: Set of 6 Glass Water Bottles – 500 ml Reusable Clear Glass Bottles with Leak-Proof Stainless-Steel Lids & Carry Straps – Ideal for Water, Juice & Fruit-Infused Drinks – Durable, Refillable & Minimalis
features: Set of 6 Reusable 500 ml Bottles – A complete hydration set for home, gym, or office. Ideal for water, juice, or infused drinks with fruit and herbs.
Durable Clear Glass Construction – Made from thick, high-quality glass that preserves the fresh taste of your drinks without absorbing odors or flavors.
Leak-Proof Stainless-Steel Lids – Each bottle includes a sleek stainless-steel screw-on cap with an inner silicone seal to prevent spills, plus a soft fabric carry strap for convenience.
Functional & Stylish Design – Transparent glass and minimalist shape make it easy to monitor your hydration while complementing any kitchen or workspace.
Practical for Everyday Use – Compact 22 cm × 6 cm size fits car cup holders, gym bags, and fridge doors perfectly.
Easy to Fill & Clean – Wide-mouth opening allows simple filling, fruit infusing, and thorough cleaning. Dishwasher-safe glass body (hand wash lid recommended).
description: Set of 6 Clear Glass Water Bottles – 500 ml Stay hydrated in style with this set of six reusable 500 ml glass water bottles. Each bottle features a sleek, clear glass body paired with a secure stainless-steel leak-proof lid and a convenient fabric carry strap. Perfect for everyday use at home, the gym, in your car, or at work. Set of 6 Bottles (500 ml Each): Ideal for families, meal prep, workplaces or keeping multiple drinks ready throughout the day. Durable Clear Glass: Made from thick, high-quality glass that does not absorb flavors, ensuring every drink tastes fresh and clean. Leak-Proof Stainless-Steel Lids: Secure screw-on caps with inner silicone seals to help prevent spills and leaks during travel. Easy to Carry: Each lid includes a strong fabric strap for on-the-go use. Perfect for Water & More: Use for plain water, fruit-infused drinks, juices, smoothies, iced tea or flavored hydration blends. Fits Cup Holders & Fridge Doors: Slim 22 cm × 6 cm design fits most standard vehicle cup holders and refrigerator shelves. Simple to Clean: Wide-mouth opening allows easy filling and rinsing. Glass bottle is dishwasher-safe; hand wash lid recommended. These bottles combine a clean, minimalist look with everyday practicality. Display your fruit-infused creations beautifully while staying hydrated wherever you go. Package Includes: 6 × 500 ml Clear Glass Bottles with Stainless-Steel Lids
